title: Fixation and embedding of organoids for histology
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"n5fo","text":"This is a modification of a previously published protocol for fixation and pre-embedding of 3D organoids prior to embedding into paraffin and sectioning for histology (see Reference). This new protocol is simplified, yet results in the same quality of FFPE sections.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
